name: physx
description: Copyright (c) 2008-2025 NVIDIA Corporation. All rights reserved.

scripts.demo: npm run check:demos && npm run build:demos && npm run serve:demos
scripts.setup:demos: npm install && npm --prefix blast/blast-stress-solver install --ignore-scripts && npm --prefix blast/js_stress_example install
scripts.build:demos: npm --prefix blast/blast-stress-solver run build && npm --prefix blast/js_stress_example run build:web
scripts.build:profiling: EMCC_PROFILING=1 npm --prefix blast/blast-stress-solver run build && npm --prefix blast/js_stress_example run build:web
